textByHash.efe33c979ab175e6f35d1feb9761225b64b8b068: Hi there. Do you need help with anything?
textByHash.930b8924046bc1166e51295dea15e791dfa38a92: Looks like you already have it. You'll need to take it back to the Pandemonium now.
textByHash.c9dbaf1fdc60f95595b3e128a67ff62e013ff1fb: Ah, you must be new to this. You can pick up and drop off cargo just over there at the ledger table.
textByHash.260afd4e33ec4be46dc5041448fe986cc220bfc1: Hi there. Can I help you with anything?
textByHash.3aa9e04d3f79f5d15b4d6ffbec41a0fb6448109e: You don't seem to have any cargo on you.
textByHash.01ab1c8e12358c46fabe7ad0193869210eeb8226: Ah, very good. Just put it over by the ledger table and I'll get it sorted.
textByHash.af94cee4b4dfa66bc1ce9f025613344c1be3a3a6: Thanks, sailor. I'll get that all sorted out. You should go let Jim know his cargo is here.
textByHash.c1cdf4c5d3431e796890a1d6608eb22938699b92: Thanks, sailor. I'll get that all sorted out.
textByHash.d0946779a5bc307643565c7bb2296b22bd9ba75b: Hi, sailor. How can I help you?
textByHash.22f7a017d19b19a34b2e92c23f85351eb9c8ca09: According to my records, you don't have any port task rewards to claim.
textByHash.be6cc1b7ddfb7b14539e8c106903e46123225325: I'm afraid you don't have any assigned tasks for me to cancel.
textByHash.9b38504c88626d740144abe7a8cde6e8494bf3cd: There you go. That's all sorted for you.
textByHash.b8a254aa663e3895865f0445dc2df7bc80881ec9: Hi there. How can I help you?
textByHash.ede4f4bbc1e84de86ed1339989e26ec69e93820d: I'm the port master. It's my job to keep everything around here running nice and smoothly for all the vessels coming and going.
textByHash.fcde7827d907e7db1def3ef5b3db627f37b1fcf0: I'm afraid not, but maybe someone else around here could help. I saw a couple of people further north on the docks. I think I heard them saying they were looking for help on their boat.
textByHash.4408796bc923e9826b8923f11094b4df18594fa1: I'm afraid I can't help you with that at the moment. You'll have to come back later.
